title: rubus corylifolius f. aciculatus
intro: Rubus corylifolius f. aciculatus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan thimbleberry, is a variety of bramble that is native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus corylifolius f. aciculatus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it easily accessible for those seeking its medicinal properties.
